title: botrychium gallicomontanum
intro: Botrychium gallicomontanum, also known as the Utah grape fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Botrychium gallicomontanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
